detect_page.title: Analyze Your Skin Photo
detect_page.upload_text: Click or drag your photo here

howitworks.title: How It Works
howitworks.subtitle: Follow these 4 simple steps to check your skin.
howitworks.step1_desc: Take a clear picture of the skin area and upload it.
howitworks.step2_desc: Our smart AI checks the photo instantly.
howitworks.step3_desc: See what the AI found and its confidence score.
howitworks.step4_desc: Learn what you can do next based on the results.

recommendations_page.title: Expert Skin Care Advice
recommendations_page.subtitle: Trusted guidelines for maintaining healthy, dermatologically-sound skin.
recommendations_page.sun_desc: Always wear sunscreen with at least SPF 30.
recommendations_page.water_desc: Drink 8+ glasses of water and moisturize daily.
recommendations_page.exam_desc: Perform monthly self-exams for any skin changes.
recommendations_page.habits_desc: Eat antioxidant-rich foods and get 8 hours of sleep.
recommendations_page.nearby_subtitle: Top dermatological centers in your area.

messages.inconclusive_desc: The image is not clear or the condition is uncertain. Please upload a high-quality image or consult a dermatologist.
messages.unknown_desc: This condition is not recognized by the model. Please consult a dermatologist.
messages.disclaimer: AI assessments are for informational purposes only. Please see a doctor.
messages.feedback_subtitle: Help us improve our AI detection and services.

about_page.title: About Us
about_page.main: Our advanced AI platform provides a simple and fast way to check your skin and understand your health instantly from home.
about_page.sec1_item1: Our system uses powerful AI to scan your photos.
about_page.sec1_item2: It identifies common skin issues with high accuracy.
about_page.sec1_item3: Get professional insights without the long wait.
about_page.sec2_item1: Just upload a clear photo of the skin area.
about_page.sec2_item2: Our AI analyzes the image in just a few seconds.
about_page.sec2_item3: Receive immediate feedback on what to do next.
about_page.sec3_item1: Your personal photos and data stay completely safe.
about_page.sec3_item2: We use high-level security to protect your privacy.
about_page.sec3_item3: Check your health from the comfort of your home.
